Growth AI · Creative Performance
8 creatives · live
Scale the winner
“Morning Routine” is your best creative — and underspent
4.6× verified ROAS, 1.9× POAS, frequency still healthy at 2.1 — but it takes only 22% of spend. Room to scale before fatigue sets in.
Refresh now
2 creatives are fatiguing and below break-even
“Cyber Monday Bundle” and “Generic Brand Banner” are at frequency 4.3+ with CTR collapsing. Both lose money after product cost — $340/day. Pause or refresh the hook.
Watch
“Desk Setup Flatlay” is softening
Frequency climbed to 3.6 and CTR is down 30% over ten days. Still profitable, but on the same path the fatiguing creatives took. Queue a fresh cut.
